mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM SAMPLE_BOARD WHERE DELETED = FALSE ORDER BY BOARD_ID DESC
SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM SAMPLE_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETED = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAMPLE_BOARD (TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT) VALUES ( #{TITLE}, #{CONTENT}, #{AUTHOR_ID}, #{VIEW_COUNT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SAMPLE_BOARD SET TITLE = #{TITLE}, CONTENT = #{CONTENT}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{BOARD_ID} AND DELETED = FALSE
UPDATE SAMPLE_BOARD SET DELETED = TRUE, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
